Imports

base_errors

Types

VariantAccessError = ref object of ArgumentError
Var4[T0; T1; T2; T3] = object
  case idx: range[0 .. 3]
  of 0:
    f0: T0
  of 1:
    f1: T1
  of 2:
    f2: T2
  of 3:
    f3: T3
  
Var3[T0; T1; T2] = Var4[T0, T1, T2, void]
Var2[T0; T1] = Var4[T0, T1, void, void]

Funcs

func getTypeName[T0, T1, T2, T3](v: Var4[T0, T1, T2, T3]): string
func idx[T0, T1, T2, T3](v: Var4[T0, T1, T2, T3]): int
func setv[T0, T1, T2, T3](v: var Var4[T0, T1, T2, T3]; val: T0 | T1 | T2 | T3)
func add[T0, T1, T2, T3](v: var seq[Var4[T0, T1, T2, T3]];
                         val: T0 | T1 | T2 | T3)
func toVar3[T0, T1, T2](val: T0): Var3[T0, T1, T2]
func toVar3[T0, T1, T2](val: T1): Var3[T0, T1, T2]
func toVar3[T0, T1, T2](val: T2): Var3[T0, T1, T2]
func toVar2[T0, T1](val: T0): Var2[T0, T1]
func toVar2[T0, T1](val: T1): Var2[T0, T1]
func toVar2[T0, T1](val: seq[T0] | seq[T1]): seq[Var2[T0, T1]]
func typeTuple[T0, T1, T2, T3](v: Var4[T0, T1, T2, T3]): auto

Templates

template get[T0; T1; T2; T3](v: Var4[T0, T1, T2, T3]; t: typed): auto
template hasType[T0; T1; T2; T3](invar: Var4[T0, T1, T2, T3]; t: typed): bool
template vmapIt[T0; T1](v: Var2[T0, T1]; t0Op, t1op: untyped): untyped
template `&=`[T0; T1; T2; T3](v: var seq[Var4[T0, T1, T2, T3]]; val: typed)
